subject: feat(labels): add zero-shot NLI label suggestion system
body:
Implement label suggestions using zero-shot NLI classification
(xtremedistil-l6-h256-zeroshot-v1.1-all-33, ~13MB q8 model) that
suggests relevant labels when creating or editing nodes. The system
uses a separate Web Worker from the embedding engine since it runs
a different model and pipeline type.

Architecture:
- tagSuggestionWorker.ts: Web Worker for NLI classification
- tagSuggestionService.ts: Worker lifecycle with ref-counted disposal
- useTagSuggestions.ts: React hook with acquire/release lifecycle
- LabelSuggestions.tsx: Inline suggestion badges below label inputs

Integration points:
- CreateNodeModal: suggests labels based on title
- DetailPanel (NodeDetail edit mode): suggests based on title + content

Candidate labels sourced from workspace metadata (useGraphMetadata)
plus default fallbacks for empty workspaces. Model download triggered
on first "Suggest Labels" click (lazy, not eager). multi_label: true
for independent scoring. Gated by config.enableLabelSuggestions.

Tags: labels, suggestions, nli, zero-shot, ml, worker, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: label-suggestions
Semver: minor
